title: caesalpinia californica
intro: Caesalpinia californica, also known as California bird's-claw, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Caesalpinia californica include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Caesalpinia californica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
